policy: Versioned pages are stored under /v1/, /v2/, /v3/, ... New versions must create a new version folder and must not overwrite old version folders.

versions.title: 题1 单题库速记版
versions.desc: 第一个版本：只包含题1，共120题。保留原始页面样式和内容。

versions.title: 题1-题6 合并速记版
versions.desc: 第二个版本：追加题2到题6，共720题，并优化题目、选项和答案展示样式。

url_rule: Every concrete version URL must include a version suffix path segment such as /v1/, /v2/, /v3/. The root URL is only a version index.
